_comment: Merge into the target repo's .github/hooks.json when installing the
git-hygiene skill (create the file with "version": 1 if missing).
beforeShellExecution matcher filters to git-commit-ish commands; the
script also re-checks. Exit 2 (or permission deny JSON) blocks the commit
and tells the agent to run the git-hygiene skill. Fails open: scanner
errors never block commits. Guards only agent-made commits, not the
user's terminal. Post-install path assumes the skill lives at
